shorts.title_distilled: Scranton Police partner with Lackawanna College.
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A new partnership in Scranton was announced, aimed at training the next generation of police. The Scranton Police Department and Lackawanna College are teaming up, giving cadets access to high-tech training that including virtual reality and simulation systems. The deal also offers scholarships for officers and their families. Officials say [...]

shorts.description: SOUTH ABINGTON TWP., LACKWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Scranton police rescued 31 malnourished cats and discovered 76 dead animals in a condemned home earlier this week. Mark Yaskoweak, 47, of Scranton, was arrested on multiple counts of animal cruelty following the investigation. The Griffin Pond Animal Shelter in South Abington Township is now housing 22 of [...]

shorts.title: Lackawanna Coal Mine Tour opens for season
shorts.title_distilled: Lackawanna Coal Mine Tour opens for season.
shorts.description: TAYLOR, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Visitors are stepping back in time as the Lackawanna Coal Mine reopens its doors for tours near Scranton. The tours give people from near and far a chance to explore Northeastern Pennsylvania's coal mining history. Miners say this work played a crucial role in The Industrial Revolution. ‘If it wasn't [...]
shorts.content: TAYLOR, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — Visitors are stepping back in time as the Lackawanna Coal Mine reopens its doors for tours near Scranton. The tours give people from near and far a chance to explore Northeastern Pennsylvania's coal mining history. Miners say this work played a crucial role in The Industrial Revolution. ‘If it wasn't [...]

shorts.title: Alleged Scranton drug dealer arrested
shorts.description: SCRANTON, LACKAWANNA COUNTY (WBRE/WYOU) — A man was arrested after police say he was found selling drugs in the Scranton area. Lackawanna County District Attorney Brian Gallagher stated a search warrant executed at home on Mineral Avenue in Scranton led to the arrest of 53-year-old Damion Foster on drug distribution charges. The search warrant stemmed [...]
